mapper.insert: insert into private_message(sender_id, receiver_id, content, is_read, create_time) values(#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{isRead}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select id, sender_id as senderId, receiver_id as receiverId, content, is_read as isRead, create_time as createTime from private_message where (sender_id = #{userId} and receiver_id = #{friendId}) or (sender_id = #{friendId} and receiver_id = #{userId}) order by create_time asc
